prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This guidance specifically pertains to local authorities, schools, and colleges within England, as it mentions the Department for Education (DfE) and outlines processes relevant to educational funding and high needs place numbers which are governed by English law and policy.
